commands.repair_reason: A narrow automated repair can align docs/startup validation and add the changelog attribution without changing the broader gateway auth model.; Needs attention: The diff hardens the pre-auth path, but the new shared-secret cap needs an explicit credential contract to avoid auth outages after upgrade.; Review finding: [P2] Publish the shared-secret length contract — src/gateway/protocol/schema/frames.ts:64-67 - [P3]... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds maxLength-backed connect auth primitives, applies them to `ConnectParamsSchema`, adds focused validator coverage, and records the Gateway security fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main accepts sub-64 KiB oversized `auth.*` strings at connect validation, and bootstrap/device paths can then compare those values through length-scaling `safeEqualSecret` calls under the bootstrap-state lock.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can align docs/startup validation and add the changelog attribution without changing the broader gateway auth model.
